sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, starting with ROSS
sprint.summary: Turn the v2 ROSS scaffold into a real, data-wired feature. v2 stays flag-ON behind /ross.html until soaked. Scope includes the full v1 multi-tab admin redesigned in Hi-Fi v2.

phases.name: Project Status dashboard + sidebar cleanup
phases.summary: Self-meta tracker built in Hi-Fi v2; sidebar bug fixes (active state, FA icons, BS5 syntax, grouping).

phases.name: ROSS v2 — gap analysis & spec
phases.summary: Read ross.jsx (handoff), v2 module, v1 cloud functions side-by-side. Map each v2 service signature to a v1 Cloud Function / RTDB path and identify the gaps.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — wire home feed
phases.summary: Replace getHomeFeed() / getHomeSidebar() with real rossGetWorkflows-derived data. Service signatures preserved.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — admin tabs (Workflows / Builder / Templates / Staff / Reports)
phases.summary: Redesign the v1 multi-tab ROSS admin in Hi-Fi v2. Wire to existing Cloud Functions; flag-ON behind /ross.html tab routes.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — button click handlers
phases.summary: Hook v2 buttons (Start workflow, Mark task done, etc.) to rossCreateRun, rossSubmitResponse, rossCompleteTask.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — first-run findings
phases.summary: Wire getFirstRunFindings() to real signals: overdue counts, stale workflows, locations without templates.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss (LLM)
phases.summary: Anthropic-backed rossChat Cloud Function. Deferred — ship phases 0–5 first.

tasks.label: Sidebar bugs: active state, fa-sparkles, ml-auto, grouping, data-bs-parent
npm run build passes; smoke test on preview channel

recentlyCompleted.title: Session goal protocol + persistent kanban backlog
ROSS location index — non-creators can see shared workflows
ROSS write lock — clients must go through Cloud Functions

high: Food cost open PR — review and merge
medium: Hi-Fi v2 → v1 promotions (guests, queue, analytics, campaigns, receipts)

sidebar.duplicateV2VsV1Entries: Tracked: dedup once v2 is promoted (separate PR). Not in scope for current branch.
